title: goniophlebium someyae
intro: Goniophlebium someyae is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniophlebium someyae include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antipyretic, analgesic, and antimicrobial properties. Goniophlebium someyae can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or dried and used as a powder in traditional remedies.
